author: hamy@hamy.xyz
text: Scope: git rm -r packages/common/tmux/, drop 'tmux' from packages_common in justfile, drop tmux from both Linux and macOS install-deps, remove README cheatsheet entry. Also dissolves the WRK-001 P3 followup about ~/.tmux.os.<key>.conf path deviation. Land as a separate commit on main after WRK-001 merges, not on the WRK-001 branch.

author: hamy@hamy.xyz
text:
Goal: Sway-style scratchpad behavior for Obsidian on macOS via AeroSpace.

Bindings:
- alt-grave -> workspace S (personal notes vault)
- alt-shift-grave -> workspace W (work notes vault)

Approach: per-workspace toggle via workspace-back-and-forth + on-window-detected routing by window title.

Config sketch (aerospace.toml):

[[on-window-detected]]
if.app-id = 'md.obsidian'
if.window-title-regex-substring = 'PERSONAL_NOTES'
run = 'move-node-to-workspace S'

[[on-window-detected]]
if.app-id = 'md.obsidian'
if.window-title-regex-substring = 'WORK_NOTES'
run = 'move-node-to-workspace W'

[mode.main.binding]
alt-grave = 'workspace-back-and-forth'  # may need a per-workspace toggle script instead
alt-shift-grave = '...'

Open questions:
- workspace-back-and-forth only remembers the last workspace, so two scratchpads competing may not toggle cleanly. May need exec-and-forget shell helper that checks current workspace and toggles to S or last-non-S accordingly.
- Confirm exact work vault window-title substring before committing.
- Multi-monitor: drift on plug/unplug accepted for now (no workspace-to-monitor-force-assignment).

Single-monitor fallback works automatically (workspaces collapse to remaining monitor).
